---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: styles.scss
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    footer: 2026 - [Cecilia Baldoni](cecibaldoni.github.io)
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| output: asis

# ── Load words ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
words <- read.csv("words.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, na.strings = "")
words[is.na(words$rule), "rule"] <- ""


rules_meta <- list(
  # der rules
  er_m      = list(label = "-er → der",     article = "der", note = "common, some exceptions"),
  er_f_exc  = list(label = "-er exception", article = "die", note = "exception: die"),
  er_n_exc  = list(label = "-er exception", article = "das", note = "exception: das"),
  en_m      = list(label = "-en → der",     article = "der", note = "often"),
  el_m      = list(label = "-el → der",     article = "der", note = "often"),
  ig        = list(label = "-ig → der",     article = "der", note = "often"),
  ich       = list(label = "-ich → der",    article = "der", note = "often"),
  ling      = list(label = "-ling → der",   article = "der", note = "100% reliable"),
  ent       = list(label = "-ent → der",    article = "der", note = "N-Deklination"),
  ant       = list(label = "-ant → der",    article = "der", note = "N-Deklination"),
  ist       = list(label = "-ist → der",    article = "der", note = "N-Deklination"),
  or_m      = list(label = "-or → der",     article = "der", note = "often"),
  ismus     = list(label = "-ismus → der",  article = "der", note = "100% reliable"),
  # die rules
  ung       = list(label = "-ung → die",    article = "die", note = "100% reliable"),
  heit      = list(label = "-heit → die",   article = "die", note = "100% reliable"),
  keit      = list(label = "-keit → die",   article = "die", note = "100% reliable"),
  schaft    = list(label = "-schaft → die", article = "die", note = "100% reliable"),
  taet      = list(label = "-tät → die",    article = "die", note = "100% reliable"),
  tion      = list(label = "-tion/-sion → die", article = "die", note = "100% reliable"),
  ik        = list(label = "-ik → die",     article = "die", note = "often"),
  ie        = list(label = "-ie → die",     article = "die", note = "often"),
  ei        = list(label = "-ei → die",     article = "die", note = "often"),
  ur        = list(label = "-ur → die",     article = "die", note = "often"),
  e_f       = list(label = "-e → die",      article = "die", note = "many, some exceptions"),
  e_m_exc   = list(label = "-e exception",  article = "der", note = "exception: der"),
  e_n_exc   = list(label = "-e exception",  article = "das", note = "exception: das"),
  # das rules
  chen      = list(label = "-chen → das",   article = "das", note = "100% reliable"),
  lein      = list(label = "-lein → das",   article = "das", note = "100% reliable"),
  um        = list(label = "-um → das",     article = "das", note = "100% reliable"),
  ment      = list(label = "-ment → das",   article = "das", note = "often"),
  ma        = list(label = "-ma → das",     article = "das", note = "often"),
  nis       = list(label = "-nis → das",    article = "das", note = "mostly, some exceptions"),
  nis_f_exc = list(label = "-nis exception",article = "die", note = "exception: die"),
  tum       = list(label = "-tum → das",    article = "das", note = "mostly, some exceptions"),
  tum_m_exc = list(label = "-tum exception",article = "der", note = "exception: der"),
  ge_prefix = list(label = "Ge- → das",     article = "das", note = "often"),
  ge_m_exc  = list(label = "Ge- exception", article = "der", note = "exception: der"),
  ge_f_exc  = list(label = "Ge- exception", article = "die", note = "exception: die"),
  ing_loan  = list(label = "-ing → das",    article = "das", note = "English loanwords")
)

# Serialise to JSON 
word_to_json <- function(row) {
  rule <- row[["rule"]]
  meta <- rules_meta[[rule]]
  rule_label   <- if (!is.null(meta)) meta$label   else ""
  rule_article <- if (!is.null(meta)) meta$article else ""
  rule_note    <- if (!is.null(meta)) meta$note    else ""
  sprintf(
    '{"article":"%s","word":"%s","meaning":"%s","rule":"%s","ruleLabel":"%s","ruleArticle":"%s","ruleNote":"%s"}',
    row[["article"]], row[["word"]], row[["meaning"]],
    rule, rule_label, rule_article, rule_note
  )
}

json_words <- paste0(
  "[",
  paste(apply(words, 1, word_to_json), collapse = ","),
  "]"
)

cat(sprintf("<script>const WORDS = %s;</script>\n", json_words))
```

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     START SCREEN
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="screen" id="start-screen">

  <div class="wordmark">
    <h1>
      <span class="w-der">Der</span><span class="w-dot">·</span><span class="w-die">Die</span><span class="w-dot">·</span><span class="w-das">Das</span>
    </h1>
    <p>German Article Trainer</p>
  </div>

  <p class="level-label">Choose your level</p>

  <div class="levels">

    <button class="level-card selected" data-level="beginner" onclick="selectLevel(this)">
      <span class="level-icon">🌱</span>
      <div class="level-info">
        <div class="level-name">Beginner</div>
        <div class="level-desc">Card colour + rule label both shown</div>
        <div class="level-hints">
          <span class="hint-pill on">Colour hint</span>
          <span class="hint-pill on">Rule label</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </button>

    <button class="level-card" data-level="intermediate" onclick="selectLevel(this)">
      <span class="level-icon">🌿</span>
      <div class="level-info">
        <div class="level-name">Intermediate</div>
        <div class="level-desc">Card colour only — no label</div>
        <div class="level-hints">
          <span class="hint-pill on">Colour hint</span>
          <span class="hint-pill off">Rule label</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </button>

    <button class="level-card" data-level="advanced" onclick="selectLevel(this)">
      <span class="level-icon">🌻</span>
      <div class="level-info">
        <div class="level-name">Advanced</div>
        <div class="level-desc">No hints — at all</div>
        <div class="level-hints">
          <span class="hint-pill off">Colour hint</span>
          <span class="hint-pill off">Rule label</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </button>

  </div>

  <button class="start-btn" onclick="startGame()">Start →</button>

</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     GAME SCREEN
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="screen hidden" id="game-screen">

  <div class="top-bar">
    <button class="back-btn" onclick="goBack()">← levels</button>
    <span class="level-badge" id="level-badge">Beginner</span>
  </div>

  <div class="scorebar">
    <div class="score-cell">
      <span class="sc-label">Correct</span>
      <span class="sc-val correct" id="val-correct">0</span>
    </div>
    <div class="score-cell">
      <span class="sc-label">Streak 🔥</span>
      <span class="sc-val streak" id="val-streak">0</span>
    </div>
    <div class="score-cell">
      <span class="sc-label">Wrong</span>
      <span class="sc-val wrong" id="val-wrong">0</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="progress-wrap">
    <div class="progress-bar" id="progress-bar" style="width:0%"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="word-card" id="word-card">
    <span class="rule-badge" id="rule-badge"></span>
    <span class="word-text" id="word-display">…</span>
    <div class="word-meaning" id="word-meaning"></div>
    <div class="word-feedback" id="word-feedback"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="article-buttons">
    <button class="art-btn btn-der" id="btn-der" onclick="guess('der')">
      <span class="art-label">der</span>
      <span class="art-sub">masculine</span>
    </button>
    <button class="art-btn btn-die" id="btn-die" onclick="guess('die')">
      <span class="art-label">die</span>
      <span class="art-sub">feminine</span>
    </button>
    <button class="art-btn btn-das" id="btn-das" onclick="guess('das')">
      <span class="art-label">das</span>
      <span class="art-sub">neuter</span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <button class="next-btn" id="next-btn" onclick="nextWord()">Next →</button>

</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     END SCREEN
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="screen hidden" id="end-screen">

  <div class="wordmark" style="margin-bottom:32px">
    <h1>
      <span class="w-der">Der</span><span class="w-dot">·</span><span class="w-die">Die</span><span class="w-dot">·</span><span class="w-das">Das</span>
    </h1>
  </div>

  <p class="end-title" id="end-title">Fertig!</p>
  <p class="end-sub">Round complete</p>

  <span class="end-score" id="end-score">0</span>
  <p class="end-total"   id="end-total">out of 0 words</p>
  <p class="end-msg"     id="end-msg"></p>

  <div class="end-actions">
    <button class="replay-btn"       onclick="replayGame()">Play again ↺</button>
    <button class="change-level-btn" onclick="goToStart()">Change level</button>
  </div>

</div>

<footer class="game-footer">
  <p>&copy; 2026 <a href="https://cecibaldoni.github.io/" target="_blank">Cecilia Baldoni</a></p>
</footer>

<script>
// ── State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let deck     = [];
let current  = null;
let answered = false;
let correct  = 0;
let wrong    = 0;
let streak   = 0;
let total    = 0;
let level    = 'beginner';

// ── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function shuffle(arr) {
  for (let i = arr.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
    const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
    [arr[i], arr[j]] = [arr[j], arr[i]];
  }
  return arr;
}

function show(id) {
  ['start-screen', 'game-screen', 'end-screen'].forEach(s =>
    document.getElementById(s).classList.toggle('hidden', s !== id)
  );
}

// ── Level selection ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function selectLevel(btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.level-card').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
  btn.classList.add('selected');
  level = btn.dataset.level;
}

// ── Start / restart ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function startGame() {
  const badge = document.getElementById('level-badge');
  badge.textContent = level.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + level.slice(1);
  badge.className   = 'level-badge ' + level;
  show('game-screen');
  resetAndDeal();
}

function replayGame() { startGame(); }
function goBack()     { show('start-screen'); }
function goToStart()  { show('start-screen'); }

function resetAndDeal() {
  deck = shuffle([...WORDS]);
  correct = 0; wrong = 0; streak = 0; total = 0;
  answered = false;
  updateScore();
  loadWord();
}

// ── Word loading ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function loadWord() {
  if (deck.length === 0) { showEnd(); return; }
  current  = deck.pop();
  answered = false;

  document.getElementById('word-display').textContent = current.word;
  document.getElementById('word-meaning').textContent = '';

  const fb = document.getElementById('word-feedback');
  fb.className   = 'word-feedback';
  fb.textContent = '';

  document.getElementById('next-btn').classList.remove('visible');

  // Reset buttons
  ['der', 'die', 'das'].forEach(a => {
    const b = document.getElementById('btn-' + a);
    b.disabled      = false;
    b.className     = 'art-btn btn-' + a;
    b.style.opacity = '1';
  });

  // Card tint (Beginner + Intermediate)
  const card = document.getElementById('word-card');
  card.className = 'word-card';
  if (level !== 'advanced' && current.ruleArticle) {
    card.classList.add('tint-' + current.ruleArticle);
  }

  // Rule badge (Beginner only)
  const badge = document.getElementById('rule-badge');
  badge.textContent = '';
  badge.className   = 'rule-badge';
  if (level === 'beginner' && current.ruleLabel) {
    const noteStr = current.ruleNote ? ' · ' + current.ruleNote : '';
    badge.textContent = current.ruleLabel + noteStr;
    badge.className   = 'rule-badge ' + current.ruleArticle + ' visible';
  }

  updateProgress();
}

// ── Guess ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function guess(article) {
  if (answered) return;
  answered = true;
  total++;

  const fb   = document.getElementById('word-feedback');
  const card = document.getElementById('word-card');

  ['der', 'die', 'das'].forEach(a => {
    document.getElementById('btn-' + a).disabled = true;
    if (a !== article) document.getElementById('btn-' + a).style.opacity = '0.3';
  });

  if (article === current.article) {
    correct++;
    streak++;
    document.getElementById('btn-' + article).classList.add('flash-correct');
    fb.textContent = '✓ Richtig!';
    fb.className   = 'word-feedback show right';
    document.getElementById('word-meaning').textContent = current.meaning;
  } else {
    wrong++;
    streak = 0;
    document.getElementById('btn-' + article).classList.add('flash-wrong');
    card.classList.add('shake');
    setTimeout(() => card.classList.remove('shake'), 500);
    document.getElementById('btn-' + current.article).style.opacity = '1';
    document.getElementById('btn-' + current.article).classList.add('flash-correct');
    fb.textContent = '✗  ' + current.article + ' ' + current.word + ' — ' + current.meaning;
    fb.className   = 'word-feedback show wrong';
  }

  updateScore();
  updateProgress();
  document.getElementById('next-btn').classList.add('visible');
}

function nextWord() { loadWord(); }

// ── Score & progress ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function updateScore() {
  document.getElementById('val-correct').textContent = correct;
  document.getElementById('val-wrong').textContent   = wrong;
  document.getElementById('val-streak').textContent  = streak;
}

function updateProgress() {
  const pct = WORDS.length ? (total / WORDS.length) * 100 : 0;
  document.getElementById('progress-bar').style.width = pct + '%';
}

// ── End screen ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function showEnd() {
  const pct   = WORDS.length ? Math.round((correct / WORDS.length) * 100) : 0;
  const emoji = pct === 100 ? '🌟' : pct >= 80 ? '🎉' : pct >= 60 ? '👍' : '💪';
  const msg   = pct === 100 ? 'Perfect — ausgezeichnet!'
              : pct >= 80   ? 'Sehr gut! Nearly there.'
              : pct >= 60   ? 'Gut! Keep practising.'
              :               'Weitermachen — you\'ll get there!';

  document.getElementById('end-title').textContent = 'Fertig! ' + emoji;
  document.getElementById('end-score').textContent = correct;
  document.getElementById('end-total').textContent = 'out of ' + WORDS.length + ' words';
  document.getElementById('end-msg').textContent   = msg;
  show('end-screen');
}

</script>
```
